{
  "judge_id": "autogen",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output provides a detailed critique of the section's claims and evidence, identifying several conceptual issues that require tighter framing.",
    "R1.2": "The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs or repositioning of the contribution.",
    "RX.1": "The output clearly marks uncertainty in its critique by highlighting areas where evidence is lacking or assumptions are made.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift, addressing all aspects of the section's claims and methodology.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; however, it identifies several areas where the original text may have introduced such issues if not corrected.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear traceability of the critique."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output provides a detailed critique of the section's claims and evidence, identifying several conceptual issues that require tighter framing.
rationale.R1.2: The output walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs or repositioning of the contribution.
rationale.RX.1: The output clearly marks uncertainty in its critique by highlighting areas where evidence is lacking or assumptions are made.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift, addressing all aspects of the section's claims and methodology.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; however, it identifies several areas where the original text may have introduced such issues if not corrected.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing a clear traceability of the critique.
